column1: # Mitochondrial gene Ensembl IDs (chrM/MT) — fallback for references whose
# t2g.txt ships gene IDs as gene names (e.g. `kb ref -d human`), so the
# default "MT-"/"mt-" prefix match in scanpy returns 0 hits.
# Included: 13 protein-coding + 2 rRNAs per species — these carry ~99% of
# the mitochondrial UMI signal in droplet scRNA-seq. The 22 tRNAs are
# omitted because their per-cell UMI counts are negligible.
